name: Foxwoods Resort Casino
about: Foxwoods Resort Casino is a large-scale destination resort and casino located in Connecticut. It offers a comprehensive array of amenities including multiple hotels, a variety of dining options, bars, lounges, and a casino. The resort provides a full entertainment experience with shows, gaming, and event spaces. For golf simulation, specific simulator details are not explicitly detailed on the provided content, suggesting it may be part of a broader entertainment offering rather than a dedicated golf facility.
why_golfers_like_it: Part of a full-service resort experience with extensive entertainment options
Multiple hotel accommodations for extended stays and trips
Variety of dining and bar venues for post-golf relaxation and entertainment

food_and_drink.notes: Numerous dining options available including quick bites, signature restaurants, and celebrity chef venues. No explicit mention of bringing in outside food.
Multiple bars and lounges on-site serving a wide selection of alcoholic beverages.

faq.answer: The resort offers numerous on-site dining and bar options. Bringing outside food or drinks is not mentioned and may not be permitted.

faq.answer: Details on simulator session duration, including time for a full 18 holes, are not specified in the provided content.

faq.answer: Yes, Foxwoods Resort Casino appears to be family-friendly, offering activities and amenities suitable for children alongside its primary casino and entertainment offerings.
